meta.label: Board Game
meta.name: Finspan
meta.short_description: Dive into the watery depths to find and observe a vast array of aquatic life.

boardgamehonor.name: 2025 Golden Geek Medium Game of the Year Nominee

boardgameaccessory.name: Finspan: Wooden Sailfin Flying Fish First Player Token

meta.description:
You are a marine researcher seeking to find and observe an array of aquatic life in the colorful Sunlight Zone, ghostly Twilight Zone, and pitch-black Midnight Zone of the world's seas and oceans. In Finspan, the fish you discover over four weeks will generate a series of benefits as you dive deeper into the ocean.

Each dive site specializes in a key aspect of expanding your research:

  • Grow your collection of fish.
  • Discover freshly laid eggs.
  • Hatch eggs into young and consolidate young to form schools.

The winner is the player with the most points gained from fish, eggs, young, schools, and achievements.

—description from the publisher
meta.wiki:
Microbadges

Finspan fan
Stonemaier Games ├─SPAN┤ fan

COMPONENTS:
Cardboard:
5 Player boards (28.4x53cm, folded)
1 Achievement Board (18x13cm, double-sided A/B)
1 First Player token
90 Egg/Young tokens (20x20mm)
40 School tokens (30x20mm)

Cardstock:
5 Player Aids (17x14cm, double-sided Fish Card Anatomy/ Ability Iconograohy & Setup)
152 Cards (57x86mm):
• 125 Fish cards (blue backs)
• 10 Starting Fish cards (turquoise backs)
• 17 Solo cards:
•• 7 Nautoma Decision cards (blue gear backs)
•• 6 Ravel Mode scoring cards (turquoise gear backs)
•• 3 Nautoma Achievement cards (double-sided)
•• 1 Player Aid (double-sided)

Wood:
30 Divers (13x9x8mm; 6x each player color - dark blue, white, teal, fuchsia, gold metallic)

Rulebook (12 p.).
Nautoma (solo) Rulebook (8 p.).
